items.title: Cohere Labs Launches Tiny Aya, Making Multilingual AI Accessible
items.summary_short: Open-weight AI designed for real-world languages that is powerful, adaptable, and efficient enough to run locally, even on a phone. Today, Cohere Labs, Cohere’s research arm, is introducing Tiny Aya, the most capable multilingual open-weight model at its scale.

topic_refs.headline: Cohere Labs Launches Tiny Aya, Making Multilingual AI Accessible

items.title_zh: Cohere Labs 推出 Tiny Aya，让多语言 AI 更易获得
items.summary_short_zh: 面向真实世界语言设计的开放权重 AI，功能强大、适应性强且高效到足以在本地运行，甚至可在手机上运行。今天，Cohere 的研究部门 Cohere Labs 推出了 Tiny Aya，这是同等规模下能力最强的多语言开放权重模型。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary_short: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency

topic_refs.headline: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials

items.title_zh: MIT 研究人员利用 AI 揭示材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_short_zh: 一种新模型可测量缺陷，并可用于提升材料的机械强度、传热性能和能量转换效率

items.title: Authors' lucky break in court may help class action over Meta torrenting
items.summary_short: Judge gave authors an easier attack on Meta’s torrenting. Meta hopes SCOTUS ruling will block it
items.title_zh: 作者在法庭上的意外好运，或有助于针对 Meta 种子下载行为的集体诉讼
items.summary_short_zh: 法官让作者更容易攻击 Meta 的种子下载行为。Meta 希望 SCOTUS 的裁决能阻止此案

source_sections.description_zh: 具有实质深度的长篇专家分析与研究解读。

source_sections.label: Research Papers
source_sections.description: Research papers and paper-trending signals tied to the current day.

items.title: HISA: Efficient Hierarchical Indexing for Fine-Grained Sparse Attention
items.summary_short: Token-level sparse attention mechanisms, exemplified by DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA), achieve fine-grained key selection by scoring every historical token for each query using a lightweight indexer, and then computing attention only over the selected subset.

topic_refs.headline: HISA: Efficient Hierarchical Indexing for Fine-Grained Sparse Attention

items.title_zh: HISA：用于细粒度稀疏注意力的高效分层索引
items.summary_short_zh: 以 DeepSeek Sparse Attention（DSA）为代表的 token 级稀疏注意力机制，通过轻量级索引器为每个查询对所有历史 token 评分，实现细粒度 key 选择，然后仅对选中的子集计算注意力。

items.title: Arithmetic OOD Failure Unfolds in Stages in Minimal GPTs
items.summary_short: Arithmetic benchmarks are often reduced to a single held-out score, but that score can conflate qualitatively different failures.

topic_refs.headline: Arithmetic OOD Failure Unfolds in Stages in Minimal GPTs

items.title_zh: 最小 GPT 中的算术 OOD 失效呈阶段性展开
items.summary_short_zh: 算术基准通常被简化为单一的留出集分数，但该分数可能混淆了性质截然不同的失败类型。

items.title: A Step Toward Federated Pretraining of Multimodal Large Language Models
items.summary_short: The rapid evolution of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) is bottlenecked by the saturation of high-quality public data, while vast amounts of diverse multimodal data remain inaccessible in privacy-sensitive silos.

topic_refs.headline: A Step Toward Federated Pretraining of Multimodal Large Language Models

items.title_zh: 迈向多模态大语言模型的联邦预训练
items.summary_short_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的快速演进正受限于高质量公开数据趋于饱和，而海量多样的多模态数据仍被封存在对隐私敏感的数据孤岛中，无法获取。

items.title: Beyond Dataset Distillation: Lossless Dataset Concentration via Diffusion-Assisted Distribution Alignment
items.summary_short: The high cost and accessibility problem associated with large datasets hinder the development of large-scale visual recognition systems. Dataset Distillation addresses these problems by synthesizing compact surrogate datasets for efficient training, storage, transfer, and privacy preservation.

topic_refs.headline: Beyond Dataset Distillation: Lossless Dataset Concentration via Diffusion-Assisted Distribution Alignment

items.title_zh: 超越数据集蒸馏：通过扩散辅助分布对齐实现无损数据集浓缩
items.summary_short_zh: 大型数据集带来的高成本和可获取性问题阻碍了大规模视觉识别系统的发展。数据集蒸馏通过合成紧凑的替代数据集，来实现高效训练、存储、传输和隐私保护，从而应对这些问题。

items.title: A Tight Expressivity Hierarchy for GNN-Based Entity Resolution in Master Data Management
items.summary_short: Entity resolution -- identifying database records that refer to the same real-world entity -- is naturally modelled on bipartite graphs connecting entity nodes to their attribute values.

topic_refs.headline: A Tight Expressivity Hierarchy for GNN-Based Entity Resolution in Master Data Management

items.title_zh: 主数据管理中基于 GNN 的实体解析的紧致表达能力层级
items.summary_short_zh: 实体解析——识别指向同一现实世界实体的数据库记录——天然适合建模为二部图，其中实体节点与其属性值相连。

items.title: daVinci-LLM:Towards the Science of Pretraining
items.summary_short: The foundational pretraining phase determines a model's capability ceiling, as post-training struggles to overcome capability foundations established during pretraining, yet it remains critically under-explored.

topic_refs.headline: daVinci-LLM:Towards the Science of Pretraining

items.title_zh: daVinci-LLM：迈向预训练科学
items.summary_short_zh: 基础预训练阶段决定了模型能力的上限，因为后训练难以突破预训练期间建立的能力基础，但这一阶段仍严重缺乏深入研究。

items.title: Categorical Perception in Large Language Model Hidden States: Structural Warping at Digit-Count Boundaries
items.summary_short: Categorical perception (CP) -- enhanced discriminability at category boundaries -- is among the most studied phenomena in perceptual psychology. This paper reports that analogous geometric warping occurs in the hidden-state representations of large language models (LLMs) processing Arabic numerals.

topic_refs.headline: Categorical Perception in Large Language Model Hidden States: Structural Warping at Digit-Count Boundaries

items.title_zh: 大语言模型隐藏状态中的类别感知：数字位数边界处的结构扭曲
items.summary_short_zh: 类别感知（CP）——在类别边界处辨别能力增强——是知觉心理学中研究最广泛的现象之一。本文报告称，大语言模型（LLM）在处理阿拉伯数字时，其隐藏状态表征中也会出现类似的几何扭曲。

items.title: Can We Change the Stroke Size for Easier Diffusion?
items.summary_short: Diffusion models can be challenged in the low signal-to-noise regime, where they have to make pixel-level predictions despite the presence of high noise. The geometric intuition is akin to using the finest stroke for oil painting throughout, which may be ineffective.

topic_refs.headline: Can We Change the Stroke Size for Easier Diffusion?

items.title_zh: 我们能改变笔触大小，让扩散更容易吗？
items.summary_short_zh: 扩散模型在低信噪比条件下可能面临挑战，因为它们必须在高噪声存在的情况下进行像素级预测。从几何直觉上看，这就像在整幅油画中始终使用最细的笔触，可能并不高效。

items.title: Attention Frequency Modulation: Training-Free Spectral Modulation of Diffusion Cross-Attention
items.summary_short: Cross-attention is the primary interface through which text conditions latent diffusion models, yet its step-wise multi-resolution dynamics remain under-characterized, limiting principled training-free control.

topic_refs.headline: Attention Frequency Modulation: Training-Free Spectral Modulation of Diffusion Cross-Attention

items.title_zh: 注意力频率调制：对扩散交叉注意力进行免训练频谱调制
items.summary_short_zh: 交叉注意力是文本条件作用于潜在扩散模型的主要接口，但其逐步、多分辨率动态仍缺乏充分刻画，限制了有原则的免训练控制。

items.title: ATLAS-RTC: Closing the Loop on LLM Agent Output with Token-Level Runtime Control
items.summary_short: We present ATLAS-RTC, a runtime control system for autoregressive language models that enforces structured output during decoding.

topic_refs.headline: ATLAS-RTC: Closing the Loop on LLM Agent Output with Token-Level Runtime Control

items.title_zh: ATLAS-RTC：通过 token 级运行时控制闭环约束 LLM Agent 输出
items.summary_short_zh: 我们提出 ATLAS-RTC，这是一种面向自回归语言模型的运行时控制系统，可在解码过程中强制结构化输出。

items.title: AdaptToken: Entropy-based Adaptive Token Selection for MLLM Long Video Understanding
items.summary_short: Long video understanding remains challenging for Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) due to high memory costs and context-length limits.

topic_refs.headline: AdaptToken: Entropy-based Adaptive Token Selection for MLLM Long Video Understanding

items.title_zh: AdaptToken：用于 MLLM 长视频理解的基于熵的自适应 token 选择
items.summary_short_zh: 由于高内存成本和上下文长度限制，多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的长视频理解仍然充满挑战。

items.title: Towards a Medical AI Scientist
items.summary_short: Autonomous systems that generate scientific hypotheses, conduct experiments, and draft manuscripts have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for accelerating discovery.

items.title: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent
items.summary_short: TypeScript multi-agent framework — one runTeam() call from goal to result. Auto task decomposition, parallel execution. 3 dependencies, deploys anywhere Node.js runs
items.title_zh: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent
items.summary_short_zh: TypeScript 多智能体框架——只需一次 runTeam() 调用，即可从目标到结果。自动任务分解、并行执行。仅 3 个依赖，可部署到任何支持 Node.js 的环境

items.title: Qwen3.5-Omni is a major multimodal release
items.summary_short: Alibaba introduced Qwen3.5-Omni , with native text/image/audio/video understanding, script-level captioning , built-in web search and function calling , and a standout “ audio-visual vibe coding ” demo where the model builds websites/games from spoken visual instructions.
items.title_zh: Qwen3.5-Omni 是一次重要的多模态发布
items.summary_short_zh: Alibaba 推出了 Qwen3.5-Omni，具备原生文本/图像/音频/视频理解、脚本级字幕生成、内置网页搜索和函数调用，以及一个亮眼的“音视频氛围编程”演示：模型可根据口头视觉指令构建网站/游戏。

topics.headline: HISA: Efficient Hierarchical Indexing for Fine-Grained Sparse Attention
topics.summary_short: Token-level sparse attention mechanisms, exemplified by DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA), achieve fine-grained key selection by scoring every historical token for each query using a lightweight indexer, and then computing attention only over the selected subset.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 2 independent source(s).

evidence.title: HISA: Efficient Hierarchical Indexing for Fine-Grained Sparse Attention
evidence.title_zh: HISA：用于细粒度稀疏注意力的高效分层索引

evidence.title: HISA: Efficient Hierarchical Indexing for Fine-Grained Sparse Attention
evidence.title_zh: HISA：用于细粒度稀疏注意力的高效分层索引

topics.headline_zh: HISA：用于细粒度稀疏注意力的高效分层索引
topics.summary_short_zh: 以 DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) 为代表的 token 级稀疏注意力机制，通过轻量级索引器为每个查询对所有历史 token 进行评分，从而实现细粒度的 key 选择，然后仅对选中的子集计算注意力。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 该研究论文出现在 2 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: A Step Toward Federated Pretraining of Multimodal Large Language Models
topics.summary_short: The rapid evolution of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) is bottlenecked by the saturation of high-quality public data, while vast amounts of diverse multimodal data remain inaccessible in privacy-sensitive silos.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: A Step Toward Federated Pretraining of Multimodal Large Language Models
evidence.title_zh: 迈向多模态大语言模型联邦预训练的一步

topics.headline_zh: 迈向多模态大语言模型联邦预训练的一步
topics.summary_short_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的快速发展正受限于高质量公共数据的饱和，而海量多样的多模态数据仍封存在对隐私敏感的数据孤岛中，无法获取。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: A Tight Expressivity Hierarchy for GNN-Based Entity Resolution in Master Data Management
topics.summary_short: Entity resolution -- identifying database records that refer to the same real-world entity -- is naturally modelled on bipartite graphs connecting entity nodes to their attribute values.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: A Tight Expressivity Hierarchy for GNN-Based Entity Resolution in Master Data Management
evidence.title_zh: 主数据管理中基于 GNN 的实体解析的紧致表达能力层级

topics.headline_zh: 主数据管理中基于 GNN 的实体解析的紧致表达能力层级
topics.summary_short_zh: 实体解析——识别指向同一现实世界实体的数据库记录——天然适合建模为二部图，其中实体节点与其属性值相连。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: AdaptToken: Entropy-based Adaptive Token Selection for MLLM Long Video Understanding
topics.summary_short: Long video understanding remains challenging for Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) due to high memory costs and context-length limits.

evidence.title: AdaptToken: Entropy-based Adaptive Token Selection for MLLM Long Video Understanding

topics.headline_zh: AdaptToken：用于 MLLM 长视频理解的基于熵的自适应 Token 选择
topics.summary_short_zh: 由于高内存成本和上下文长度限制，长视频理解对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）而言仍具挑战。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: Arithmetic OOD Failure Unfolds in Stages in Minimal GPTs
topics.summary_short: Arithmetic benchmarks are often reduced to a single held-out score, but that score can conflate qualitatively different failures.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Arithmetic OOD Failure Unfolds in Stages in Minimal GPTs
evidence.title_zh: 最小 GPT 中的算术 OOD 失败呈阶段性展开

topics.headline_zh: 最小 GPT 中的算术 OOD 失败呈阶段性展开
topics.summary_short_zh: 算术基准测试常被简化为单一的留出集分数，但该分数可能混淆了性质上不同的失败类型。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: ATLAS-RTC: Closing the Loop on LLM Agent Output with Token-Level Runtime Control
topics.summary_short: We present ATLAS-RTC, a runtime control system for autoregressive language models that enforces structured output during decoding.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: ATLAS-RTC: Closing the Loop on LLM Agent Output with Token-Level Runtime Control
evidence.title_zh: ATLAS-RTC：通过 Token 级运行时控制闭环约束 LLM Agent 输出

topics.headline_zh: ATLAS-RTC：通过 Token 级运行时控制闭环约束 LLM Agent 输出
topics.summary_short_zh: 我们提出 ATLAS-RTC，这是一种面向自回归语言模型的运行时控制系统，可在解码过程中强制结构化输出。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: Attention Frequency Modulation: Training-Free Spectral Modulation of Diffusion Cross-Attention
topics.summary_short: Cross-attention is the primary interface through which text conditions latent diffusion models, yet its step-wise multi-resolution dynamics remain under-characterized, limiting principled training-free control.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Attention Frequency Modulation: Training-Free Spectral Modulation of Diffusion Cross-Attention
evidence.title_zh: 注意力频率调制：对扩散交叉注意力的免训练频谱调制

topics.headline_zh: 注意力频率调制：对扩散交叉注意力的免训练频谱调制
topics.summary_short_zh: 交叉注意力是文本条件作用于潜在扩散模型的主要接口，但其逐步多分辨率动态仍缺乏充分刻画，限制了有原则的免训练控制。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: Beyond Dataset Distillation: Lossless Dataset Concentration via Diffusion-Assisted Distribution Alignment
topics.summary_short: The high cost and accessibility problem associated with large datasets hinder the development of large-scale visual recognition systems. Dataset Distillation addresses these problems by synthesizing compact surrogate datasets for efficient training, storage, transfer, and privacy preservation.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Beyond Dataset Distillation: Lossless Dataset Concentration via Diffusion-Assisted Distribution Alignment
evidence.title_zh: 超越数据集蒸馏：通过扩散辅助分布对齐实现无损数据集浓缩

topics.headline_zh: 超越数据集蒸馏：通过扩散辅助分布对齐实现无损数据集浓缩
topics.summary_short_zh: 大规模数据集带来的高成本和可获取性问题阻碍了大规模视觉识别系统的发展。数据集蒸馏通过合成紧凑的替代数据集，来实现高效训练、存储、迁移和隐私保护，从而应对这些问题。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文来自 1 个独立来源。

topics.headline: Can We Change the Stroke Size for Easier Diffusion?
topics.summary_short: Diffusion models can be challenged in the low signal-to-noise regime, where they have to make pixel-level predictions despite the presence of high noise. The geometric intuition is akin to using the finest stroke for oil painting throughout, which may be ineffective.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Can We Change the Stroke Size for Easier Diffusion?
evidence.title_zh: 我们能改变笔触大小，让扩散更容易吗？

topics.headline_zh: 我们能改变笔触大小，让扩散更容易吗？
topics.summary_short_zh: 扩散模型在低信噪比条件下会面临挑战，因为它们必须在高噪声存在的情况下进行像素级预测。其几何直觉类似于在整个油画过程中始终使用最细的笔触，这可能并不有效。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Categorical Perception in Large Language Model Hidden States: Structural Warping at Digit-Count Boundaries
topics.summary_short: Categorical perception (CP) -- enhanced discriminability at category boundaries -- is among the most studied phenomena in perceptual psychology. This paper reports that analogous geometric warping occurs in the hidden-state representations of large language models (LLMs) processing Arabic numerals.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Categorical Perception in Large Language Model Hidden States: Structural Warping at Digit-Count Boundaries
evidence.title_zh: 大语言模型隐藏状态中的范畴知觉：数字位数边界处的结构扭曲

topics.headline_zh: 大语言模型隐藏状态中的范畴知觉：数字位数边界处的结构扭曲
topics.summary_short_zh: 范畴知觉（CP）——即在类别边界处增强的可辨别性——是知觉心理学中研究最广泛的现象之一。本文报告称，在处理阿拉伯数字时，大语言模型（LLM）的隐藏状态表征中也会出现类似的几何扭曲。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: daVinci-LLM:Towards the Science of Pretraining
topics.summary_short: The foundational pretraining phase determines a model's capability ceiling, as post-training struggles to overcome capability foundations established during pretraining, yet it remains critically under-explored.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: daVinci-LLM:Towards the Science of Pretraining
evidence.title_zh: daVinci-LLM：迈向预训练科学

topics.headline_zh: daVinci-LLM：迈向预训练科学
topics.summary_short_zh: 基础预训练阶段决定了模型能力的上限，因为后训练很难突破预训练阶段奠定的能力基础，但这一阶段仍然严重缺乏研究。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

x_buzz.title: Qwen3.5-Omni is a major multimodal release
x_buzz.summary: Qwen3.5-Omni is a major multimodal release : Alibaba introduced Qwen3.5-Omni , with native text/image/audio/video understanding, script-level captioning , built-in web search and function calling , and a standout “ audio-visual vibe coding ” demo where the model builds websites/games from spoken visual instructions. Reported capabilities include support for 10h audio / 400s of 720p video , 113 speech-recognition languages , and 36 spoken languages ; Alibaba claims it outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro in audio and match...

x_buzz.title: Cohere Labs Launches Tiny Aya, Making Multilingual AI Accessible
x_buzz.summary: Open-weight AI designed for real-world languages that is powerful, adaptable, and efficient enough to run locally, even on a phone. Today, Cohere Labs, Cohere’s research arm, is introducing Tiny Aya, the most capable multilingual open-weight model at its scale. Tiny Aya delivers state-of-the-art translation quality, strong multilingual understanding, top-quality target language responses, and broad language coverage in a model small enough to run locally, even on consumer hardware and mobile ph
